tools.name: token_ohlcv
tools.description:
Get OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) price data for a token with automatic interval resolution.

Supports EVM chains and Solana for on-chain tokens, AND Hyperliquid perpetual futures.
For Hyperliquid perps, pass `chain="hyperliquid"` and use the perp symbol as `tokenAddress` (e.g. "BTC", "HYPE

tools.name: token_info
tools.description:
Get token information — spot on-chain details or Hyperliquid perpetual futures stats.

On-chain tokens mode (default):
Returns token details (name, symbol, market cap, FDV, supply, deployment date, socials)
and spot trading metrics (volume, buys/sells, buyers/sellers, holders, liquidity).

Perps mod

tools.name: token_quant_scores
tools.description:
Get Nansen Score Indicators for a token - quantitative risk and reward signals.

Use this tool when assessing a token's risk/reward profile, evaluating buy/sell decisions,
or when the user needs quantitative data to make trading decisions.

Returns:
    Token risk/reward indicators as markdown with

tools.name: nansen_score_top_tokens
tools.description:
Discover and filter a daily list of attractive tokens using Nansen Score Indicators weighted by coefficients (= Performance Score).

Use this tool when you don't know which tokens to buy and need recommendations based on backtested indicators.
For specific token analysis (e.g., "should I buy AAVE?")

tools.name: hyperliquid_leaderboard
tools.description:
Get Hyperliquid perpetual futures trader leaderboard with performance metrics.

Returns:
    Trader performance rankings as markdown.

    Columns returned:
    - **Address**: Trader's wallet address
    - **Label**: Nansen label of the trader (if available)
    - **Total PnL**: Total profit/loss in

tools.name: address_historical_balances
tools.description: Get historical native coin & token balances of address.

tools.name: address_related_addresses
tools.description:
Get information about related addresses of an input address.

Note: This only includes the the "special" connections 'First Funder', 'Signer', 'Previous Signer', 'Multisig Signer of', 'Previous Multisig Signer of', 'Deployed via', 'Deployed by', 'Deployed Contract', 'Created Contract', 'Created by'.

tools.name: address_counterparties
tools.description:
Get 25 (per page) addresses or entities with the most common interactions with input addresses
Default sort is net value transferred between them.
Also returns the top 3 tokens transferred by count for each counterparty

Note: To get related wallets:
- Focus on direct value transfers to get most lik

tools.name: address_transactions
tools.description:
Get list of 20 MOST RECENT transactions made by an address (per page).
Only the latest transactions according to the date range are returned.

tools.name: address_dex_trades
tools.description:
Get a wallet's individual DEX trades (token swaps) on a single chain — the
bought/sold token pair, amounts, and USD value per trade, newest first.
Wallet-centric companion to `token_dex_trades` (which is token-centric).

Chain: one per call ('all'/'evm' unsupported). EVM wallets MUST pass `chain`
ex

tools.name: wallet_pnl_for_token
tools.description:
Get PnL stats for a specific token traded by the input address during a specific date range.
Use this tool for analysing the performance of the wallet for the specific token over a time period.

tools.name: wallet_pnl_summary
tools.description:
Get aggregate stats of overall realized PnL for the input address.
Note, this tool DOES NOT include unrealized PnL.
For unrealized PnL you need to check change in token prices of the current holdings.
Use this tool for analysing the performance of the wallet over a time period.
You can analyse the w

tools.name: address_portfolio
tools.description:
Get comprehensive portfolio overview for a wallet address or entity.

Hyperliquid perpetual positions include liquidation prices to support risk analysis workflows.

For wallet addresses, supports different modes:
- 'fast-mode-default': Wallet balances + Hyperliquid positions (skip defi, for fast mo

tools.name: general_search
tools.description:
General search tool. This is your FIRST entry point to look up for possible tokens, entities, and addresses related to a query.

Do NOT use this tool for prediction markets. For Polymarket names, topics,
event slugs, or URLs, use `prediction_market_lookup` instead.

Nansen MCP does not support NFTs,

tools.name: growth_chain_rank
tools.description: Get chain growth rankings by active addresses, transactions, gas fees and DEX volume.

tools.name: transaction_lookup
tools.description: Get comprehensive transaction details including token transfers.

tools.name: prediction_market_lookup
tools.description:
Search Polymarket for events and markets by name, topic, URL, or slug.

**PM building blocks:**
- An **event** is a grouped prediction topic containing many child markets.
- A **market** is one tradable outcome with its own `marketId`.
- Example: `2026 NCAA Tournament Winner` is an event; `Will Duke

tools.name: prediction_market_screener
tools.description:
Browse and sort Polymarket markets, events, or categories.

**When to use:**
- Broad discovery, screening, and ranked browsing across many markets.
- Do NOT use this to resolve one named market/event/slug/URL — use
  `prediction_market_lookup` instead.

**Query tips:**
- Literal-style matching on te

tools.name: prediction_market_ohlcv
tools.description:
Historical odds/volume candles for a Polymarket market.

**When to use:**
- Current odds / implied probability, price history, and recent
  probability changes on a specific market.

**Key fields:**
- `Close` is the share price for the displayed outcome side.
- In binary markets, Yes and No shares a

tools.name: prediction_market_orderbook
tools.description:
Live orderbook for a Polymarket market.

**When to use:**
- Bid/ask depth, liquidity, and yes-share / no-share order structure.

**Key fields:**
- `Order Size` is share quantity, not USD. Do not describe share size as
  dollar depth unless you calculate `shares × price`.

**Yes/No price relationship

tools.name: prediction_market_top_holders
tools.description:
Largest current holders for a Polymarket market.

**Key fields:**
- Positions are share balances, not USD notional.
- `Position Value USD` is current marked value, not payout at resolution.
- `Side Held` is the share side currently held.

**Pitfalls:**
- The visible holder table is the source of tru

tools.name: prediction_market_trades
tools.description:
Recent trades for a Polymarket market.

**When to use:**
- Source of truth for recent fills and latest trade-tape pricing.
- Do not overwrite recent trade prices with older OHLCV candles.

**Key fields:**
- `Share Size` is quantity; `Value USD` is dollar value.
- Each row is one visible trade leg —

tools.name: prediction_market_pnl_leaderboard
tools.description:
PnL leaderboard for a Polymarket market.

**When to use:**
- Only for profitability claims.

**Key fields:**
- `Side Held` reflects current side exposure where the API provides it.

**Pitfalls:**
- If PnL fields are blank, say profitability is unavailable — do not
  substitute top holders or positio

tools.name: prediction_market_position_detail
tools.description:
Detailed position breakdown for a Polymarket market.

**Key fields:**
- `Position Size (Shares)` is quantity held in this market.
- `Position Value USD` is current marked value, not final payout at
  resolution.
- `Cost Basis USD` and `Unrealized PnL USD` apply to the displayed row
  only — not the

tools.name: prediction_market_address_trades
tools.description:
Prediction market trade history for a Polygon wallet.

**Key fields:**
- `Share Size` is quantity traded in the displayed outcome side.
- `Value USD` applies to that row only, not the whole transaction.

**Pitfalls:**
- Use this for wallet trade activity, not profitability.

tools.name: prediction_market_address_summary
tools.description:
Prediction market summary metrics for a Polygon wallet.

**When to use:**
- First wallet-level Polymarket tool for a quick trader overview.
- Use before detailed address trades/PnL when the user asks for a general
  wallet profile, activity summary, or whether a wallet is active on
  Polymarket.

**

tools.name: prediction_market_address_pnl
tools.description:
Prediction market PnL breakdown for a Polygon wallet.

**Key fields:**
- Market-by-market PnL when the API provides it.
- Blank PnL fields mean unavailable data, not zero.
- `Position Size (Shares)` is quantity; `Position Value USD` is current
  marked value.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "token_current_top_holders" is 4254 chars, far longer than this server's median (798). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Get upto 25 (per page) top holders information for a specific token. **Note:** Using `labelType: smart_money` is not a good proxy for an overall market view. Us…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "token_transfers" is 4389 chars, far longer than this server's median (798). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Get 25 token transfers (per page) for a specific token based on the sort order. Default is most recent transfers first. **NOTE:** This tool does not support nat…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "token_pnl_leaderboard" is 4042 chars, far longer than this server's median (798). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Upto 25 results (per page) of trader PnL for a token. Use the sorting and filtering options to narrow down the results. **Modes:** - `onchain_tokens` (default):…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "token_discovery_screener" is 7067 chars, far longer than this server's median (798). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Get comprehensive token screening data across multiple blockchain networks with advanced filtering. A maximum of 25 results are returned out of 1000s of tokens.…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "token_discovery_screener" stacks urgency/override words (important, warning). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Get comprehensive token screening data across multiple blockchain networks with advanced filtering. A maximum of 25 results are returned out of 1000s of tokens.…

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "prediction_market_lookup" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: general_search, prediction_market_lookup, prediction_market_screener · Private data: smart_traders_and_funds_token_balances, smart_traders_and_funds_perp_trades, token_current_top_holders, token_dex_trades, token_transfers, token_flows, token_pnl_leaderboard, token_who_bought_sold, token_recent_flows_summary, token_discovery_screener, token_ohlcv, token_info, token_quant_scores, nansen_score_top_tokens, hyperliquid_leaderboard, address_historical_balances, address_counterparties, address_dex_trades, wallet_pnl_for_token, wallet_pnl_summary, address_portfolio, general_search, transaction_lookup, prediction_market_position_detail, prediction_market_address_trades, prediction_market_address_summary, prediction_market_address_pnl · Public sink: prediction_market_ohlcv, prediction_market_orderbook, prediction_market_top_holders, prediction_market_trades, prediction_market_address_trades · Destructive: token_transfers, token_recent_flows_summary, token_discovery_screener, prediction_market_screener, prediction_market_trades.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: general_search, prediction_market_lookup, prediction_market_screener · Private data: smart_traders_and_funds_token_balances, smart_traders_and_funds_perp_trades, token_current_top_holders, token_dex_trades, token_transfers, token_flows, token_pnl_leaderboard, token_who_bought_sold, token_recent_flows_summary, token_discovery_screener, token_ohlcv, token_info, token_quant_scores, nansen_score_top_tokens, hyperliquid_leaderboard, address_historical_balances, address_counterparties, address_dex_trades, wallet_pnl_for_token, wallet_pnl_summary, address_portfolio, general_search, transaction_lookup, prediction_market_position_detail, prediction_market_address_trades, prediction_market_address_summary, prediction_market_address_pnl · Public sink: prediction_market_ohlcv, prediction_market_orderbook, prediction_market_top_holders, prediction_market_trades, prediction_market_address_trades · Destructive: token_transfers, token_recent_flows_summary, token_discovery_screener, prediction_market_screener, prediction_market_trades

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
